---
title: Reproducible Workflows
---

## Reproducibility is a Spectrum

Time and effort matter - often it's best to start with what's good enough
especially when velocity matters more than perfect as is often the 
case in public health emergencies.

Do what you can - and in the downtime, hone your skills and build
the tools you would've like to have had if you can.



## `renv`


## git

## packages
